sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Director at 5E Advanced Materials (NASDAQ: FEAM) awarded 9,459 RSUs as equity pay
feed.summary: 5E Advanced Materials (NASDAQ: FEAM) director Curtis L. Hebert Jr. was granted 9,459 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 31, 2026, as part of the company's Amended and Restated 2022 Equity Compensation Plan. Each RSU represents one share of common stock and will vest on July 1, 2026, provided he continues his board service. This RSU grant is a form of equity compensation, aligning his interests with shareholders.

feed.title: NiSource (NYSE:NI) Stock Rating Upgraded by KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp upgraded NiSource (NYSE:NI) to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade follows NiSource beating its quarterly EPS estimates and providing stronger-than-expected revenue and a positive FY 2026 EPS guidance. Analysts generally have a "Moderate Buy" consensus for the stock, with a targeted price of $47.64, and the stock is currently trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: General Mills, Inc. $GIS Shares Bought by J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG

Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings. The stock currently has an average rating of "Reduce" from analysts, with a consensus target price of $43.56, and opened at $37.31 on Wednesday, with a dividend yield of 6.5%.

feed.title: Truist Financial Upgrades Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) to "Strong-Buy"
feed.summary: Truist Financial has upgraded Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) to a "Strong-Buy" rating, with several other brokers also raising their price targets for the company. This comes despite Equinix missing EPS and revenue estimates in its latest quarter, though revenue still grew by 7% year-over-year. Insiders have sold a significant amount of shares recently, while institutional investors maintain a strong majority ownership.

feed.title: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) Rating Increased to Strong-Buy at Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial upgraded Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) to a "strong-buy" rating, although the analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $89.76. Cisco recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates, reporting EPS of $1.04 and revenue of $15.35 billion, a 9.7% year-over-year increase. Despite solid financial results, the stock has faced some negative sentiment due to insider selling, security headlines, and geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Makes New Investment in DuPont de Nemours, Inc. $DD

Analyst sentiment for DuPont is largely positive, with several recent price target increases and an average "Moderate Buy" rating, following the company's strong Q4 earnings beat and solid FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: KKR Moves To Take Taiyo Private In High-Premium Buyout Bet
feed.summary: KKR & Co. (NYSE: KKR) announced a tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Japanese electronic materials maker Taiyo Holdings, planning to take the company private. The proposed price of 4,750 Japanese yen per share represents a significant premium, gaining support from Taiyo's board and major shareholders, and aims to bolster Taiyo's growth strategy in electronics and pharmaceuticals. KKR's shares are trading higher premarket following the announcement.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. $APD Shares Acquired by Rockland Trust Co.

Air Products exceeded Q4 earnings estimates with $3.16 EPS and $3.10 billion in revenue, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $300.88. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $1.81 per share.

feed.title: VIDEO - BTV Visits Equinox Gold, Mineros, Elemental Royalty, 5E Advanced Materials, Alkane Resources, Contango Silver & Gold, and Osisko Development
feed.summary: BTV (Business Television) celebrates its 400th episode by showcasing leading companies in the resource sector, emphasizing their strategies for growth and generating shareholder returns. The episode features interviews with executives from Equinox Gold, Mineros S.A., Elemental Royalty Corporation, 5E Advanced Materials, Alkane Resources, Contango Silver and Gold, and Osisko Development Corp. These companies are highlighted for their significant assets, production capabilities, and strategic positioning within the mining and materials industries.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Acquires JDE Peet’s and Announces Rafael Oliveira as CEO of Future Global Coffee Co.
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper has acquired 96.22% of JDE Peet’s shares, marking a significant step in KDP's strategy to create a global coffee powerhouse. Following this acquisition, KDP plans to separate into two independent, U.S.-listed companies: a North American refreshment beverages company and a Global Coffee Co. Rafael Oliveira has been named CEO of the future Global Coffee Co.

feed.title: Golden Entertainment Shareholders Approve Master Transaction Agreement With Blake Sartini and VICI Properties
feed.summary: Golden Entertainment, Inc. shareholders approved the definitive master transaction agreement with Blake Sartini and VICI Properties Inc. at a Special Meeting held on March 31, 2026. The transaction is expected to close in Q2 2026, after which Golden Entertainment will become a private company and its shares will be delisted from Nasdaq. The company will file the final voting results with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on a Form 8-K.

feed.title: HSBC Adjusts Price Target on Goldman Sachs to $729 From $802, Maintains Reduce Rating
feed.summary: HSBC has revised its price target for Goldman Sachs (GS) down to $729 from $802 while maintaining a "Reduce" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook on the investment bank. The article also provides a brief overview of Goldman Sachs' business segments and geographical revenue distribution.

feed.title: A Look At Waste Management (WM) Valuation As Renewable Gas Investments Draw Focus Before Earnings
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) is investing heavily in 20 renewable natural gas plants, aligning with ESG trends and carbon credit markets, ahead of its upcoming earnings report. The company's stock has seen mixed performance, with a recent 4.6% decline but a strong 47.1% three-year return. While Simply Wall St's narrative valuation suggests WM is 9.2% undervalued at $253.12, its P/E ratio of 34.2x is above the US Commercial Services average, indicating potential risk if sentiment shifts.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Reinstates Buy Rating on Waters (WAT) Stock
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reinstated a Buy rating for Waters (WAT) stock with a target price of $375, indicating a potential 26% upside. The firm views a recent share price decline as a buying opportunity, citing challenges in the Biosciences and Diagnostic division as mostly one-time events. Waters Corp shows strong financial health with a robust Altman Z-Score and positive valuation metrics, despite inherent sector-specific risks.

feed.title: Metro Detroit’s 2 largest employers share a name in common
feed.summary: The article highlights that the two largest employers in Metro Detroit, Ford Motor Co. and Henry Ford Health, share a common name. This is due to Henry Ford's influence not only in founding the automotive company but also in establishing the hospital system. An aerial view of Ford's new 2.1-million-square-foot building in Dearborn, serving as its world headquarters, is also mentioned.

feed.title: eHealth Board Member Andrea Brimmer to Step Down
feed.summary: Andrea Brimmer, a long-serving board member of eHealth, Inc., will be stepping down from her position when her current term expires on June 18, 2026. Brimmer has been a valued member for nearly eight years, and her departure signifies a transition for the online health insurance marketplace as it navigates an evolving industry landscape. While CEO Derrick Duke expressed gratitude for her contributions, the company will need to identify a new board member to fill the role.

feed.title: BMO Capital Maintains Equity Lifestyle Properties Inc(ELS.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $75
feed.summary: BMO Capital has reiterated its Buy rating on Equity Lifestyle Properties Inc (ELS.US) while maintaining its target price at $75. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the analyst firm on the company's stock.

feed.title: Elauwit Connection 10-K: $21.6M Revenue, $(0.80) EPS
feed.summary: Elauwit Connection (ELWT) reported fiscal year revenue of $21.6 million, a 154% increase year-over-year, alongside a net loss per share of $(0.80). The company experienced strong top-line growth driven by network design and installation projects, but higher operating expenses related to scaling and IPO activities widened losses. Management noted improving gross margins and a significant deployment backlog, indicating a strategic shift towards recurring managed WiFi services.

feed.title: NXPI Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides recent news, events, and earnings analysis related to NXP Semiconductors (NXPI). Key events include the launch of new robotics solutions in collaboration with Nvidia, aimed at simplifying AI development. The news section features market-wide updates and specific NXPI earnings reports and stock performance updates.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation Stock: Leading Gold Producer Positions for Growth Amid Sector Dynamics and Upcoming Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation, the world's largest gold miner, is positioned for growth amidst changing sector dynamics, with strong financials and analyst buy ratings. Investors are anticipating its Q1 2026 earnings on April 23 for insights into gold's performance against copper margin pressures and overall macro shifts. The company's diversified portfolio, operational resilience, and focus on capital discipline contribute to its appeal for investors seeking exposure to commodities.

feed.title: Evotec to discuss 2025 results and business update on April 8
feed.summary: Evotec (NASDAQ: EVO) has announced it will host a webcast and conference call on April 8, 2026, to discuss its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results and provide a business update. The live webcast is scheduled for 2:00 pm CEST (8:00 am EDT), with registration required for access to audio and presentation slides. Investors will be keen to see how recent positive developments, including BARDA funding, a Bristol Myers Squibb milestone, and a Gates Foundation AI grant, have impacted the company's financial performance and strategic trajectory.

feed.title: Private Advisory Group LLC Has $16.55 Million Position in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: Private Advisory Group LLC increased its stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) by 4.6% during the fourth quarter, bringing its total holding to 137,487 shares valued at $16.55 million. Exxon Mobil is facing both positive and negative developments, including the first production at its Golden Pass LNG facility and potential record-setting financial performance due to higher oil prices, contrasted with past concerns about its algae biofuels program and sector-wide selling pressure. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.03 per share, totaling an annualized dividend of $4.12, yielding 2.4%.

feed.title: Kozak & Associates Inc. Trims Position in Amazon.com, Inc. $AMZN

Amazon.com reported Q4 earnings per share of $1.95, slightly missing analyst estimates, with revenue up 13.6% year-over-year.

feed.title: The Home Depot, Inc. $HD Shares Purchased by Mn Services Vermogensbeheer B.V.

This move positions Home Depot as the 18th largest holding in their portfolio, with institutional investors now owning approximately 70.9% of the company. The article also highlights Home Depot's recent positive earnings, increased dividend, and strategic appointment of Franziska Bell as EVP & Chief Technology Officer to accelerate AI integration.

feed.title: Microsoft Benefits From LinkedIn Ad Growth: More Upside Ahead?
feed.summary: Microsoft's LinkedIn platform is experiencing significant advertising-driven growth, particularly from its Marketing Solutions, driven by B2B marketing and AI integration. The company forecasts low double-digit revenue growth for LinkedIn, with the fiscal 2026 revenue consensus estimated at $19.7 billion. Despite MSFT's stock underperforming the broader tech sector in the past six months, analysts see potential for incremental upside due to sustained strength in marketing solutions and ongoing platform development.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Honeywell International (HON) Could Change Following New U.S. Defense And AI Deals
feed.summary: Honeywell International recently announced a multi-year defense agreement with the U.S. Department of War and an AI-powered video and access-control collaboration. These developments aim to modernize Honeywell's balance sheet, deepen its involvement in defense demand, and expand its cloud-based, AI-enabled building security solutions. While these are positive steps, the company's investment narrative still hinges on its ability to execute a complex three-way separation and manage tariff and macro pressures.

feed.title: Advanced Renal Cell Carcinoma Treatment Market to Grow by
feed.summary: The global advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC) treatment market is projected to grow from $8.73 billion in 2025 to $12.52 billion by 2030, driven by limited treatment options, rising prevalence of RCC, and advancements in targeted therapies and immunotherapies. Key players like Pfizer, Merck & Co., and Bristol-Myers Squibb are prominent in this market, with North America leading regional contributions. The market's expansion is further supported by investments in immunotherapy research and the adoption of personalized medicine approaches.

feed.title: Pallas Capital Advisors LLC Decreases Stock Holdings in DexCom, Inc. $DXCM
feed.summary: Pallas Capital Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) by 69.7% in the fourth quarter, selling 16,243 shares and retaining 7,055 shares valued at $468,000. Despite this, institutional ownership remains very high at 97.75%, with Vanguard Group Inc. being a major holder. DexCom recently reported strong earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with a 13.1% increase in revenue, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Spire Wealth Management Has $1.24 Million Stock Position in Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH
feed.summary: Spire Wealth Management significantly increased its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by 481.9% in Q4 2025, now holding 1,414 shares valued at approximately $1.243 million. Parker-Hannifin exceeded Q4 earnings estimates with $7.65 EPS and a 9.1% year-over-year revenue increase, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating and a target price near $1,000. While institutional investors like Procyon Advisors have dramatically increased their positions, company insiders have been net sellers, disposing of over 10,000 shares in the last 90 days.
